title: Software Update - DFU - Can be completed for standalone headsets
scenario: DFU completes successfully for standalone headset via Poly Studio Mobile app Device Settings > Software
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Pair the standalone headset with the app via the Home screen.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Tap on Software (or Software Update) under Device Settings.
5. Tap the Update button to initiate the DFU (Device Firmware Update).
6. Wait for the firmware update process to complete without interruption.
expected: The firmware update completes successfully. The headset reboots (if required) and the updated firmware version is displayed in Device Settings > Software.
